events.title: Digital Charcoal — Opening Night
events.description: Opening reception for the solo exhibition Digital Charcoal. Works from the Digital Charcoal and Form and Void series on view through August.

events.title: Positions Berlin — Booth 4.12
events.description: Participating artist at Positions Berlin, international art fair for contemporary art. New works from the Carvão Digital series.

events.title: Form and Void — Group Exhibition
events.description: Group exhibition exploring structure and dissolution. Presenting selected works from the Form and Void series alongside five European artists.
